pi_items.source: Task description strictly mandates editing the nickname field to exactly 'Primary OSTC'.
Parsed the underlying SampleDivesV2.ssrf XML data, revealing the full device model string is exactly 'Heinrichs Weikamp OSTC 3'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real dive log data downloaded directly from the official Subsurface SampleDivesV2.ssrf repository. The task explicitly requires setting the dive computer nickname to 'Primary OSTC'. Direct inspection of the source XML dataset confirms that while the task broadly targets 'OSTC 3', the full model attribute stored in the file is 'Heinrichs Weikamp OSTC 3'.
